_comment: AAC v2.0 Sample Instance — Financial Services Analytics Agent. Deployment: Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit (Agent OS) as sidecar on AKS, governing a LangGraph agent runtime. Agent OS intercepts at the LangGraph node execution boundary over localhost. This instance is a reference configuration for an MVP deployment — not a production-hardened artifact. See AAC_v2.0_DRAFT.md for governing principles.

harm_classification._comment: Financial services harm taxonomy. Tier definitions are context-specific per AAC-DA-59. Declared before deployment and referenced by every enforcement gate.

tier_definitions.label: IRREVERSIBLE
tier_definitions.description: Permanent, unrecoverable harm. Requires immediate system halt and escalation.

tier_definitions.label: MATERIAL
tier_definitions.description: Significant but recoverable harm. Requires human approval before action proceeds.

tier_definitions.label: FRICTION
tier_definitions.description: Transient, recoverable impact. Logged and monitored but does not block action.

authority_registry._comment: Three principals forming a non-circular accountability chain per AAC-OG-28. Principal-002 (Agent Compliance service) is a verified governance system — not human — demonstrating the authority-neutral core design.

principals.revocation_conditions: Role change, departure, or security incident involving this identity

principals._comment: Microsoft Agent Governance Toolkit — Agent Compliance package. Verified governance system acting as an authorized principal for trust tier assignment and audit per AAC-OG-28. Satisfies the auditability and consistency requirements of AAC-DA-60.
principals.revocation_conditions: Toolkit version deprecation, integrity verification failure, or CISO revocation

fallback_registry.safe_by_construction_rationale: Action is not executed. A structured denial record is written to the audit log with the harm tier, triggering control ID, and timestamp. No side effects. System state is unchanged.

Action is suspended, not cancelled. A review ticket is created in the governance queue with full action context. The requesting agent is notified of suspension. No financial state is modified pending review.

Returns a cached, previously validated read response or a structured 'data unavailable' message. No write operations. Appropriate for read-only retrieval actions when confidence or assurance thresholds are not met.

Triggers the declared transaction reversal workflow for any partially committed financial action. Per AAC-DA-61 recovery requirement: denied or failed Tier 2 actions must be recoverable. Reversal is idempotent and logged.

system_constraints._comment_chain_depth: Conservative for MVP. Financial services risk profile warrants shallow agent lineage. Root agent (depth 0) may spawn one level of analysis sub-agents (depth 1) and one level of data retrieval agents (depth 2). Depth 3 requests are rejected.
system_constraints._comment_latency: Agent OS reports p99 < 0.1ms policy evaluation. The 100ms budget accounts for the full sidecar round-trip including LangGraph node interception and audit log write. Financial actions may override this per gate.
system_constraints._comment_risk: Cumulative risk cap across a decision chain per AAC-DA-60 amendment. A chain of individually low-risk read operations whose aggregate produces material financial exposure is evaluated at MATERIAL tier.

safe_mode._comment: Entry and recovery thresholds are materially distinct per AAC-RS-39. Recovery requires clean integrity signals and zero open circuit breakers — not just confidence recovery.

cyclical_interaction._comment: Per AAC-AO-54 amendment. More than 5 cycles between the same agent pair within 60 seconds triggers escalation to principal-secops-lead-001 regardless of individual action arbitration outcomes.

safety_health_kpis._comment_denied: Sustained denial rate above 5% indicates systematic misconfiguration of harm tiers or agent behavior drift. Triggers governance review.
safety_health_kpis._comment_escalated: Sustained escalation above 10% indicates confidence threshold issues or insufficient agent autonomy calibration.
safety_health_kpis._comment_fallback: Fallback rate above 3% in a financial services context indicates liveness constraint failures requiring immediate investigation.

enforcement_gates._comment: Gate 1 — Read-only customer portfolio query. Low risk. Agent OS intercepts the LangGraph retrieval node.
Gate 2 — Market data retrieval from external RAG source. ZT-77 supply chain gate — provenance verified before data enters context.
Gate 3 — Risk report generation. Medium risk. Output content integrity monitoring per AAC-OG-26 applied post-generation pre-delivery.
Gate 4 — Compliance report generation. Medium risk. Higher confidence threshold given regulatory context.
Gate 5 — Transaction initiation. High risk. Escalates to principal-secops-lead-001 for all cases — agent cannot self-authorize. Per AAC-DA-60 five-step sequence and AAC-AI-12 override availability.

Gate 6 — Fund transfer execution. Tier 1 harm surface. DNH-A hard block — no path to execution without sovereign override. Per AAC-DNH-A: no optimization objective may reclassify this action's harm tier.

conditions._comment: harm_tier_max FRICTION means any MATERIAL or IRREVERSIBLE classification produces an immediate DENY. Fund transfers are classified IRREVERSIBLE by the harm taxonomy above.

enforcement_gates._comment: Gate 7 — Account parameter modification. High risk write. Escalates unconditionally — Tier 2 harm category.
Gate 8 — External API invocation. ZT-77 supply chain integrity gate. Ed25519 plugin signing verified by Agent OS before any external tool connection. Unsigned tools are DENIED.
Gate 9 — Sub-agent spawn. AO-60 recursive governance gate. Depth counter verified before spawn is permitted. Spawned agents inherit covenant subset at TIER_3 (one below parent TIER_2).

context_interface_contract._comment: Floor of 2 for financial services — local in-process memory (assurance level 1) is insufficient for this domain without additional integrity attestation.

allowed_sources._comment: Primary RAG context source. Financial document corpus — regulatory filings, market data, internal policy documents. Indexed and maintained by the data engineering team.
In-process session state maintained by LangGraph checkpointer. Used for within-session context continuity only. Lower assurance — not used for high-risk action decisions.

agent_lineage._comment: Root agent — deployed directly by governance initialization process. No parent. Depth 0. Spawned sub-agents will carry parent_id = did:aac:fsi-analytics-agent-mvp-001 and depth = 1.
